extraction_note: HTML source was sparse — primarily page markdown with no embedded <style> blocks, no inline style attributes, no SVG gradient definitions, and no Tailwind arbitrary-value classes. All colour values derive from branding_json.colors, which was treated as the primary palette source given the absence of HTML evidence. branding_json.colors.accent (#007AFF) and branding_json.colors.link (#007AFF) are identical hex values; only one entry retained, labelled 'accent/link'. branding_json.typography fontSizes (h1: 16px, h2: 16px, body: 14px) are flagged as likely nav-link samples rather than true heading sizes — used with low confidence for hierarchy derivation. No SVG gradients, CSS gradients, embedded style blocks, or Tailwind hex classes found in the provided HTML source; gradients array is empty. components object in branding_json was empty — no button or input styling extractable. Font families (Open Sans, Montserrat, Roboto, PT Serif, Georgia) sourced from branding_json.fonts; no Google Fonts <link> or @font-face rules present in the provided HTML. colorScheme set to 'light' — consistent with branding_json and the white/light-background content visible in the markdown. No chart or data visualisation elements observed in source.

palette.name: Industrial Blue
palette.usage: Primary brand colour for headings, key UI elements, and structural emphasis in infographics and covers

palette.name: Safety Green
palette.usage: Secondary accent for supporting callouts, data highlights, success indicators, and visual contrast against blue

palette.name: Link Blue
palette.usage: Hyperlinks, interactive elements, and subtle accent highlights; close to primary blue — use sparingly to differentiate interactive states

palette.name: Pure White
palette.usage: Primary canvas background for all assets; dominant neutral surface

palette.name: Dark Charcoal
palette.usage: Body copy, descriptive labels, supporting text in infographics and covers

colours.proportion_rule: 60% white/light neutral (#FFFFFF), 30% primary industrial blue (#0072BB), 8% secondary green (#92C141), 2% accent link blue (#007AFF)

backgrounds.light_variant: solid white #FFFFFF — clean, flat, no texture or overlay observed

iconography.colour_usage: not_found_in_source — no inline SVG icons observed in provided HTML; likely uses #0072BB primary blue or #92C141 green based on brand palette

data_visualisation.chart_aesthetic: Clean, flat-style charts on white #FFFFFF background with minimal gridlines; industrial-technical register aligned with scientific sector audience
data_visualisation.stat_callout_format: Large bold Montserrat numeral in #0072BB with smaller Open Sans label in #444444 beneath

brand_marks.logo_placement_convention: Top-left header placement; centered use appropriate for social assets

brand_guardrails.avoid: Dark or black canvas backgrounds — no dark-mode treatment observed in source
brand_guardrails.instead: Use white #FFFFFF as the primary canvas with #0072BB structural elements for depth and hierarchy

brand_guardrails.avoid: Decorative gradients or multi-colour gradient treatments — no gradient evidence found in source
brand_guardrails.instead: Use flat solid fills of #0072BB, #92C141, and #FFFFFF for all backgrounds, shapes, and UI elements

brand_guardrails.avoid: Highly rounded or pill-shaped design elements that suggest consumer/lifestyle brand identity
brand_guardrails.instead: Use the documented 3px border radius for a precise, technical, slightly-rounded aesthetic appropriate for industrial and scientific audiences

brand_guardrails.avoid: Warm colour palettes (oranges, reds, yellows) that undermine technical credibility
brand_guardrails.instead: Anchor all assets in the cool industrial blue #0072BB and neutral white #FFFFFF, with green #92C141 as the only warm-leaning accent

brand_guardrails.avoid: Decorative script typefaces or hand-drawn illustration styles
brand_guardrails.instead: Use Montserrat (heading, bold) and Open Sans (body) for a precise, professional, scientifically credible typographic register

generation_suffixes.core: Clean industrial colour palette: dominant white #FFFFFF canvas, structural industrial blue #0072BB, safety green #92C141 accent. Bold Montserrat headings with Open Sans body text. Precise slightly-rounded geometry with 3px radius. Flat solid fills, no gradients. Technical-professional register suited to scientific and industrial sectors.
generation_suffixes.infographic: White #FFFFFF base with industrial blue #0072BB section headers and structural dividers, safety green #92C141 data highlights and callout numerals. Bold Montserrat for stat labels, Open Sans for supporting copy. Flat solid fills, sharp-yet-slightly-rounded 3px geometry. Technical-precision aesthetic with scientific-industrial authority.
generation_suffixes.cover_image: White #FFFFFF primary canvas with industrial blue #0072BB dominant headline treatment and bold Montserrat display typography at heavy weight. Safety green #92C141 used as a targeted accent highlight. Flat solid colour blocks, no gradients. Slightly-rounded 3px shape language. Clean, authoritative, precision-industrial tone.
generation_suffixes.social_square: White #FFFFFF background with bold industrial blue #0072BB Montserrat headline and safety green #92C141 accent detail. Flat solid fills, no textures or gradients. Precise 3px slightly-rounded geometry. Open Sans supporting text in dark charcoal #444444. Technical-professional, scientific-credibility register.
